vocab.meaning: xuất hiện dày đặc, có rất nhiều
vocab.example: In my residential area, high-rise apartments are thick on the ground, creating a very modern atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: đẹp đến mức ngạc nhiên, gây sửng sốt
vocab.example: There are some eye-popping skyscrapers nearby that boast incredible architectural designs.

vocab.meaning: rất gần, chỉ một khoảng cách ngắn
vocab.example: A massive sixty-story office building is located just a stone's throw from my front door.

vocab.meaning: vươn tới những vì sao (ý nói tòa nhà cực kỳ cao)
vocab.example: The luxury towers in my district seem to reach for the stars, dwarfing all the traditional houses around them.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp với (tốc độ đô thị hóa/xây dựng)
vocab.example: New skyscrapers are springing up constantly to keep pace with the rapid urban development in my city.

vocab.meaning: là phần thiết yếu/đặc trưng của cái gì
vocab.example: Tall buildings are now part and parcel of the local landscape due to the scarcity of land.

vocab.meaning: vượt trội hoàn toàn, cao hơn hẳn (nghĩa đen và bóng)
vocab.example: The central landmark tower stands head and shoulders above all the other structures in my neighborhood.
In the late afternoon, these massive monoliths tend to blot out the sun, leaving the streets in shadow.

vocab.meaning: bắt mắt, thu hút sự chú ý
vocab.example: The new glass-fronted building nearby is incredibly eye-catching when the sunlight reflects off its surface.
Unlike the city center, tall buildings are few and far between where I live, as it's a low-density suburb.
